pages.title: Three Seed Paths
pages.text: $(bold)Fiber Reed$()$(br)$(li)10% chance from grass or tall grass.$(br2)$(bold)Protein Soy and Alcohol Bloom$()$(br)$(li)Found in exploration chests.$(br)$(li)Also available from apprentice villagers.

pages.title: Village Trades
pages.text: $(li)$(thing)Farmer$(): 2 Protein Soy Seeds for 3 emeralds.$(br)$(li)$(thing)Cleric$(): 2 Alcohol Bloom Seeds for 3 emeralds.$(br2)Trades are selected from a pool. Check several villagers if a trade does not appear.
